---
title: "Explore Taiwan 🇹🇼"
author: "Molly Tseng"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    embed-resources: true
    transition: fade
    css: styles.css
    center: false
---

##  Explore Taiwan

Travel across Taiwan by region and discover the island’s most beautiful destinations

<div style="text-align:center; margin-top:50px;">

<img src="images/taiwan_collage.jpg" width="500px" style="border-radius:20px;">

</div>
---

## North Taiwan

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="42%"}
### Must-visit spots
- **Taipei 101**
- **Raohe Night Market**
- **Jiufen Old Street**
- **Elephant Mountain**
:::

::: {.column width="58%"}
<div class="photo-grid">
  <img src="images/north1.jpg">
  <img src="images/north2.jpg">
  <img src="images/north3.jpg">
  <img src="images/north4.jpg">
</div>
:::

:::

---

## Central Taiwan

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="42%"}
### Must-visit spots
- **Sun Moon Lake**
- **Qingjing Farm**
- **Alishan**
- **Gaomei Wetlands**
:::

::: {.column width="58%"}
<div class="photo-grid">
  <img src="images/central1.jpg">
  <img src="images/central2.jpg">
  <img src="images/central3.jpg">
  <img src="images/central4.jpg">
</div>
:::

:::
---

## South Taiwan

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="42%"}
### Must-visit spots
- **Kaohsiung Harbor**
- **Liuhe Night Market**
- **Kenting Beach**
- **Anping Old Street**
:::

::: {.column width="58%"}
<div class="photo-grid">
  <img src="images/south1.jpg">
  <img src="images/south2.jpg">
  <img src="images/south3.jpg">
  <img src="images/south4.jpg">
</div>
:::

:::

---

## East Taiwan

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="42%"}
### Must-visit spots
- **Taroko Gorge**
- **Qixingtan Beach**
- **Brown Avenue**
- **Sanxiantai**
:::

::: {.column width="58%"}
<div class="photo-grid">
  <img src="images/east1.jpg">
  <img src="images/east2.jpg">
  <img src="images/east3.jpg">
  <img src="images/east4.jpg">
</div>
:::

:::

---

##  Why Visit Taiwan?

- Amazing food
- Friendly people
- Diverse landscapes

Taiwan is small but full of unforgettable experiences

<div style="text-align:center; margin-top:50px;">
  <img src="images/explore4.jpg"width="400px">
</div>
